nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI as the starting point

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: AI cherry-picking sources to support predetermined views
nodes.grounding_span: I just don't trust AI to be thourough enough

nodes.label: AI as debugging assistant
nodes.grounding_span: it just kept telling me the same wrong solution over and over again

nodes.label: AI for tedious data processing
nodes.grounding_span: a massive spreadsheet tens of thousands of lines long that I would have to find a way to manually check over like a month

nodes.label: AI dependence driven by corporate pressure
nodes.grounding_span: the corporate side of the work I do is always looking for buzz words and asking how we could use AI

nodes.label: Efficiency in problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: I used gemini with system instructions to filter it down to just a few hundred lines I needed to manually check

nodes.label: Epistemic accuracy and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I much prefer to do it myself, I just don't trust AI to be thourough enough

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it would take a human a long time to do (they're also really boring) but AI could be purpose trained to do it quickly

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: Most satisfying is when theres a massive spreadsheet tens of thousands of lines long that I would have to find a way to manually check over like a month but I used gemini with system instructions to filter it down

nodes.label: Frustration with AI stubbornness in XCode
nodes.grounding_span: it just kept telling me the same wrong solution over and over again until I gave up

nodes.label: Distrust of AI reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I just don't trust AI to be thourough enough

nodes.label: Mixed feelings about increasing AI reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I can see my relationship with AI becoming more dependant. I don't neccesarily want it

nodes.label: Iterative verification through external sources
nodes.grounding_span: it presents a few solutions and then i take those and do research elsewhere, academic papers, forums, blogs, everything really

nodes.label: Back-to-basics problem-solving when AI fails
nodes.grounding_span: I stopped trying to do what the AI was telling me to and just took it back to what I knew and understood and worked my way up
